eastern hemisphere people select their own future and carry it

the practical things are more important than ideal ones, so

Directions: Preliminaries 95
Jupiter reveals how the individual will invite experience, and
how he will expand his relationships. In the case of Bismarck
too the planets are between the fifth and the tenth houses,
with Jupiter in the third. These two were sensitive to respon
sibility and they were the executors of their own opportuni
ties. Jupiter in the second for Napoleon has spread forth the
personality laying out all the resources. On the other hand,
Bismarck, since he had Jupiter in the third worked with the
potentialities that were near him. Jupiter reveals himself in
